attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  RFQ1.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER  FISCAL_SNPSHT_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
  BK_PRODUCT_ID                 ,
  BASE_PRODUCT_ID               ,
  GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE         ,

  PRODUCT_ACTIVE_FLAG           ,
  CISCO_FINISHED_PROD_TYPE_CODE ,

  ADJUSTMENT_PRODUCT_FLAG       ,

  RU_ROHS_COMPLIANCE_FLAG       ,
  RU_OS_TYPE_CODE               ,
  RU_OS_FEATURESET_NAME         ,
  RU_OS_FEATURESET_DESCRIPTION  ,

  BK_MANUFACTURING_PLANT_ID     ,
  BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID        ,

  ITEM_KEY                      ,
  RU_OS_SOFTWARE_ROLE           ,

  SHIPPABLE_FLG                 ,
  BK_PRODUCT_HIER_COMPANY_ID    ,
  EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
  EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
  EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
  RU_SOFTWARE_SUBSCRIPTION_CD   ,
  NEW_PRODUCT_FLG               ,
  PRODUCT_PRICING_CATEGORY_CD   ,
  FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT        ,
  SERVICEABLE_PRODUCT_FLG       ,
  DV_ITEM_TYPE_CD               ,
  SERVICE_FLG                   ,
  PRODUCT_PLANNING_LIFE_CYCLE_CD,
  PROGRAM_NAME                  ,
  PROD_PLANNING_CLASSF_CD       ,
  PRODUCT_BUNDLE_FLG            ,
  PROD_PLANNING_ATTACH_RATE_FLG ,
  BK_PLANNING_ID                ,
  BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME       ,
  BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME   ,
  RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG             ,
  RU_SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD       ,

  RU_PRDT_MTHLY_TERM_LENGTH_CNT ,
  RU_PRDT_ROUTE_MRKT_OFR_GRP_CD ,
  RU_ATTRIBUTION_OFFER_TYPE_CD  ,
  RU_ATTRIBUTION_METHODOLOGY_CD ,
  RU_ATTRIBUTION_REQUIRED_FLG   ,
  BK_SUPER_PLANNING_ID          ,
  AUTO_TEST_FLG                 ,
  SERIAL_CONTROL_CD             ,
  RU_DEFAULT_INITIAL_TERM_INT   ,
  RU_DEFAULT_RNWL_TERM_INT      ,
  RU_TENTATIVE_FIRST_CUST_SHP_DT,
  RU_RYLTY_BEARING_FLG          ,
  RU_RYLTY_MAX_UNITS_QTY        ,
  RU_LICENSE_TYPE_CD            ,
  RU_INITIAL_TERM_LIST_TXT      ,
  RU_RNWL_TERM_LIST_TXT         ,
  RU_NON_STD_INITIAL_TRM_RNG_TXT,
  RU_NON_STD_RNWL_TERM_RANGE_TXT,
  /*Commented as part of XAAS Q1FY16
  RU_PREPYMNT_TERM_CD           ,
  */
  RU_BKG_SRC_CD                 ,

  RU_RQST_SVC_RNWL_WNDW_DAYS_CNT,

  /*Added as part of XAAS Q1FY16*/

  ,DEFAULT_TRUE_UP_TRM_MTHS_CNT  
  ,DEFAULT_BILLING_MODEL_CD

  ,NON_STD_TRUE_UP_TERM_DESCR    
  ,BILLING_MODEL_DESCR           
  ,PRICING_FORMULA_CD

  ,USAGE_REPORTING_TYPE_CD       
  ,RESOURCE_TYPE_FOR_OVERAGE_CD  
  ,QUANTITY_UOM_CD

  ,PRDT_RELIABILITY_CLASS_NAME   
  ,ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_CD         
  ,BASE_DISCOUNT_PCT             
  ,LICENSE_MODEL_NAME            
  ,DELIVERY_OPTION_CD            
  ,RU_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD  
  /* End Q1FY16*/ 
  /*Added as part of XAAS Q3FY16*/
  ,DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLG
  /* End Q3FY16*/ 
  /*kguvvala added as part of XAAS MAY-22-2016 release*/

  ,ORDERING_ENVRNMNT_AVLBLTY_CD
  /*End MAY-22-2016 release*/

  ,OFFR_ATTR_TOP_SKU_CMPNSTN_FLG  /* prmaddal: Added as part of SOT OA Q2FY17 Release */

 ,ELA_FLG
 ,XCAT_FLG
 ,RECURRING_OFFER_FLG

  ,ANNUITY_SBSCRPTN_MODEL_TYPE_CD

  ,CREATE_SINGLE_SBSCRPTN_FLG
  ,PRICING_UNIT_NAME
  ,PRICING_UNIT_DURATION_INT
  ,SBSCRPTN_MIDTERM_CHNG_ALWD_CD
  /* End Q3FY17*/ 
  ,MULTI_OA_BUNDLE_STATUS_CD
 /* XAAS - Q1FY18*/
 ,RYLTY_PYMT_ASMNT_REQD_FLG 
 ,THIRD_PRTY_ACTVTN_KEY_FLG
 ,END_CUST_CNCT_EML_REQD_FLG
 ,SOFTWARE_LICENSE_ENABLED_FLG
 ,COALESCE ( RPF.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN' ) DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD 
 ,PRODUCT_CREATOR_ID
 ,DV_PRODUCT_CREATOR_ID
 /* END*/
 
 /* XAAS Q2FY18 */
 ,CONTAINS_SUBSCRIPTION_CD
 ,TERM_AND_PAYMENTS_MANDATORY_FLG
 ,PAK_ELIGIBILITY_FLG
 ,SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
    /* END Q2FY18 */
    
    /*ACV_RO Q3FY18*/
    ,ACV_FLG 
    ,ACV_WRKR_PRTY_KEY 
    /* END ACV_RO Q3FY18*/
    ,JIGSAW_ENABLED_FLG
    /* PID standardization */
    ,BOOKING_POLICY_RULE_NAME
    ,TCV_RECURRING_FLG
    ,INCLUDES_SOFTWARE_FLG
    ,TERMS_AND_CONTENT_CD
    /*end*/
    ,SW_ATR_CTD_BY_CSCO_WRK_PTY_KEY ,
       SW_ATR_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRK_PTY_KEY,
	   SW_VALUATION_SPECIFICS_NAME    /* Annuity eGenie Q2FY19 Dec Rel changes */
	   ,ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
 ,SBA_FLG ,
 BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,
EA_NET_PRC_PRTCTN_MDL_NAME,
EA_NET_PRC_PRTCTN_NAME
,PRODUCT_SOURCE_CD
,PRD_METERING_TYPE_NAME /* Added as athena sep rel*/
,FULL_STACK_USG_BASED_TECHN_NM /*ATHENA NOV RELEASE CHANGE*/
,FULL_STACK_USG_BASED_USE_CS_NM
,CONSUMPTION_TYP_NM
,IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG
,THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_NM
,DV_SFTWR_SUBSC_ITM_CATGRZTN_NM /*ATHENA FEB Change*/
,RENEWAL_FEE_TYP_NAME /*Q3FY22 May Release*/
,ONE_TIME_CHARGE_TYPE_NAME/* monisha Nov release q3fy22*/
,ONBOARDNG_SERV_PYMNT_MNTH_CNT/* monisha Nov release q3fy22*/
,COMP_BUSINESS_MODL_PROD_LINE_CD/*snunagop cbm_nov release*/
,COMP_BUSINESS_MODL_PROD_GRP_ID/*snunagop cbm_nov release*/
,GOODS_PRODUCT_LINE_CD/*snunagop cbm_nov release*/
,PROGRAM_INDICATOR_CD
, EA_CX_IDENTIFIER_FLG
,EA_SUITE_TYPE_CD
,EA_MAPPED_SOFTWARE_ATO_NAME
 	 	    /*AI Attributes enablement*/
 ,AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM
 , AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_VAL_NM
 ,MAPPED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RPF
  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFQ1
  ON 1=1
  WHERE  RFQ1.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
